filterName: Filter Events to Raw Document Step
overview: This step merges back extracted content coming as filter events into its original document format. It is the counterpart to the **Raw Document to Filter Events Step** — together they form the minimal pipeline for round-tripping a document through a filter. Takes filter events as input and sends a raw document (or `NO_OP` if writing to a stream).
processingNotes: A minimal round-trip pipeline pairs **Raw Document to Filter Events Step** → **Filter Events to Raw Document Step** to extract and then merge a document using a filter.
Sends `NO_OP` instead of a raw document when writing to a stream.

examples.title: Minimal round-trip pipeline
examples.description: The simplest pipeline to extract a document into filter events and merge it back into its original format. Any processing steps (e.g., leveraging, search-and-replace) would be inserted between these two steps.
examples.config:
```
Raw Document to Filter Events Step
  ↓
(... optional processing steps ...)
  ↓
Filter Events to Raw Document Step
```
